summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Admin CAEN codes management page. All 23 backend API tests passed (after fixing CSV import bug). All frontend UI features verified working: stats display, search, filters, CRUD operations, pagination, Rev.1 update button, CSV import button.

backend_api: GET /api/admin/caen/stats - Returns 200 with total, valid_descriptions, generic_descriptions, used_by_firms, rev1_mapping_size
GET /api/admin/caen/stats - Requires admin auth (401/403 without token)
GET /api/admin/caen/codes - Returns paginated codes with total, skip, limit, codes array
GET /api/admin/caen/codes - Requires admin auth
GET /api/admin/caen/codes?skip=10&limit=10 - Pagination works correctly
GET /api/admin/caen/codes?q=0111 - Search by code works
GET /api/admin/caen/codes?q=comert - Search by name works
GET /api/admin/caen/codes?filter=valid - Filter for valid descriptions works
GET /api/admin/caen/codes?filter=generic - Filter for generic descriptions works
POST /api/admin/caen/codes - Add new CAEN code works
POST /api/admin/caen/codes - Duplicate code returns error
POST /api/admin/caen/codes - Missing fields returns error
PUT /api/admin/caen/codes/{cod} - Update CAEN code works
PUT /api/admin/caen/codes/{cod} - Update non-existent code returns error
DELETE /api/admin/caen/codes/{cod} - Delete CAEN code works
DELETE /api/admin/caen/codes/{cod} - Delete non-existent code returns error
POST /api/admin/caen/update-rev1 - Rev.1 update works (returns updated, upserted, total, remaining_generic)
POST /api/admin/caen/update-rev1 - Requires admin auth
POST /api/admin/caen/import-csv - CSV import works with valid data
POST /api/admin/caen/import-csv - Requires admin auth
Verify added code appears in list (GET after POST)
Verify update persisted (GET after PUT)
Verify delete removed code (GET after DELETE)
frontend_ui: Page header shows 'Coduri CAEN' with subtitle
Stats cards display: Total (1,345), Valid (1,066), Generic (279), Used by Firms (1,275)
Rev.1 Update section with 'Actualizeaza Rev.1' button visible
CSV Import section with 'Alege fisier CSV' button and Template link visible
CAEN codes table displays with columns: Cod, Denumire, Sectiune, Status, Actiuni
Search input and 'Cauta' button work (found 64 codes for 'comert')
Filter buttons work: Toate, Valide (1,066), Generice (279)
Add button opens form with Cod, Denumire, Sectiune inputs
Add form submission creates new code
Edit button enables inline editing with Salveaza/Anuleaza buttons
Delete button shows confirmation with Sterge/Nu buttons
Pagination shows 27 pages, Next/Previous buttons work
Sidebar shows 'Baza de Date' dropdown with 'Coduri CAEN' link highlighted

bugs_fixed.issue: CSV import failed with TypeError: 'delimiter' must be string, not NoneType
bugs_fixed.fix: Removed invalid csv.DictReader call with delimiter=None, moved delimiter detection before reader creation

critical_code_review_comments: All CAEN admin endpoints properly implement admin-only access with role check
CRUD operations correctly handle edge cases (duplicate, missing fields, non-existent)
CSV import auto-detects delimiter (comma, semicolon, tab) - good UX
Rev.1 update uses upsert pattern - creates missing codes, updates existing
Frontend uses proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Stats are calculated efficiently using MongoDB aggregation
seed_data_creation: Test CAEN codes (9996, 9997, 9998, 9999) were created and deleted during testing - no permanent test data left
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin CAEN page fully tested and working. Backend routes in /app/backend/routes/admin_caen_routes.py. Frontend page at /app/frontend/src/pages/AdminCaenPage.js. CSV import bug was fixed (delimiter=None issue). Stats show 1,345 total codes, 1,066 valid, 279 generic, 1,275 used by firms. Rev.1 mapping has 489 codes available.
